# Syslifters Handbook

> Syslifters ist ein spezialisiertes Pentesting-Unternehmen aus Österreich mit Fokus auf Pentests von Active Directory, Entra ID, Infrastrukturen und Web-Applikationen.
>
Syslifters is a specialized penetration testing company from Austria, focused on pentests of Active Directory, Entra ID, infrastructures and web applications.

## Table of Contents

- [👩‍💻 Secure Coding Policy](https://handbook.syslifters.com/organization/secure-coding.md): Secure coding requirements and OWASP checklist alignment for Syslifters projects.
- [📝 Information Security and Privacy Policy](https://handbook.syslifters.com/organization/information-security-policy.md): Policy defining how Syslifters protects information security and personal data.
- [🔥 Privacy Incident and Breach Management Process](https://handbook.syslifters.com/organization/incident-response.md): Process for identifying, containing, and reporting privacy incidents and data breaches.
- [About our organization](https://handbook.syslifters.com/organization.md): Overview of Syslifters’ organization, structure, and internal policies.
- [About the handbook](https://handbook.syslifters.com/about-the-handbook.md): What this handbook is, who it’s for, and how to contribute.
- [AD enumeration](https://handbook.syslifters.com/pentesting-manual/active-directory/enumeration/ad-enumeration.md): Tools and techniques for enumerating Active Directory and Entra ID environments.
- [ADCS](https://handbook.syslifters.com/pentesting-manual/active-directory/lateral-movement/adcs.md): Active Directory Certificate Services (AD CS) notes and references for common abuse paths.
- [Advisories](https://handbook.syslifters.com/advisories.md): Security advisories and disclosure reports published by Syslifters
- [Advisories](https://handbook.syslifters.com/de/advisories.md): Security Advisories und Disclosure-Berichte von Syslifters.
- [After our pentests](https://handbook.syslifters.com/after-pentests.md): What happens after a pentest - report delivery, retesting, and access deprovisioning guidance.
- [AMSI](https://handbook.syslifters.com/pentesting-manual/active-directory/defense-evasion/amsi.md): AMSI / ETW / Script Block Logging bypasses for PowerShell and .NET payloads.
- [Andere Lösungsvorschläge?](https://handbook.syslifters.com/de/microsoft-teams-status-disclosure.md): Wie der Microsoft-Teams-Status (Presence) sensible Gewohnheiten preisgeben kann und welche Admin-Optionen die Sichtbarkeit für Externe reduzieren.
- [Android emulation](https://handbook.syslifters.com/pentesting-manual/mobile/android-emulation.md): Set up Android Studio emulators for mobile testing, including proxying and CA certificates.
- [Antivirus & EDR](https://handbook.syslifters.com/pentesting-manual/active-directory/defense-evasion/antivirus-edr.md): Techniques for disabling, weakening or bypassing AV/EDR (Windows Defender and third-party products) on hosts during AD assessments.
- [API endpoints wordlists](https://handbook.syslifters.com/pentesting-manual/web-applications/wordlists/api-endpoints.md): Links and quick workflow for API route discovery wordlists/tools.
- [Aron Molnar](https://handbook.syslifters.com/about-us/aron.md): Profile page and CV for Aron Molnar with contact details, experience, and certifications.
- [Aron Molnar](https://handbook.syslifters.com/de/ueber-uns/aron.md): Profilseite und Lebenslauf von Aron Molnar mit Kontakt, Erfahrung und Zertifikaten.
- [ASP.NET endpoint checklist](https://handbook.syslifters.com/pentesting-manual/web-applications/dotnet-endpoints.md): Common ASP.NET MVC / Identity endpoints and files to probe during testing.
- [ASP.NET ViewState](https://handbook.syslifters.com/pentesting-manual/web-applications/viewstate.md): ViewState deserialization background and tooling references.
- [Attack-path data collection](https://handbook.syslifters.com/pentesting-manual/entraid-azure/enumeration/attack-path-data-collection.md): Collect Entra ID and Azure resource data for BloodHound attack-path enumeration with AzureHound.
- [Azure Arc](https://handbook.syslifters.com/pentesting-manual/entraid-azure/lateral-movement/azure-arc.md): Abusing Azure Arc as a bidirectional pivot between on-premises Active Directory and Azure, with an audit checklist for engagements.
- [Azure resource configuration audit](https://handbook.syslifters.com/pentesting-manual/entraid-azure/enumeration/azure-resource-configuration-audit.md): Audit Azure subscription (resource / control plane) configuration with ScoutSuite to surface storage, NSG, Key Vault, and SQL misconfigurations.
- [Before our pentests](https://handbook.syslifters.com/before-pentests.md): What to expect before a pentest - scoping, timeboxing, permission to attack, lead times, and preparation steps.
- [BitLocker](https://handbook.syslifters.com/pentesting-manual/active-directory/privilege-escalation/bitlocker.md): Local privilege escalation by booting into WinRE with a BitLocker recovery key and tampering with the OS.
- [Canvas apps vs model-driven apps](https://handbook.syslifters.com/pentesting-manual/power-platform/difference-between-canvas-apps-and-model-driven-apps.md): Key differences between Power Apps canvas apps and model-driven apps, and when to use each.
- [Cheat sheets](https://handbook.syslifters.com/pentesting-manual/web-applications/cheat-sheets.md): Curated external cheat sheets referenced in our web application testing notes.
- [Checklist](https://handbook.syslifters.com/pentesting-manual/entraid-azure/checklist.md): Practical checklist for Entra ID and Azure assessments, including CA policy review, tooling, and common risk areas.
- [Christoph Mahrl](https://handbook.syslifters.com/about-us/christoph.md): Profile page for Christoph Mahrl with contact details, experience, and certifications.
- [Christoph Mahrl](https://handbook.syslifters.com/de/ueber-uns/christoph.md): Profilseite und Lebenslauf von Christoph Mahrl mit Kontakt, Erfahrung und Zertifikaten.
- [Common security issues in financial web apps](https://handbook.syslifters.com/pentesting-manual/web-applications/common-security-issues-financial-apps.md): Reference material for checkout/payment and financially oriented web application issues.
- [Conditional Access](https://handbook.syslifters.com/pentesting-manual/entraid-azure/defense-evasion/conditional-access.md): Auditing Entra ID Conditional Access policies and the built-in bypasses that apply to a tenant.
- [Contact us](https://handbook.syslifters.com/contact-us.md): Contact options for Syslifters (email with S/MIME, Signal, phone, LinkedIn, GitHub).
- [Corporate identity](https://handbook.syslifters.com/organization/corporate-identity.md): Brand assets and guidelines for Syslifters/SysReptor/SysLeaks - logos, colors, badges, and fonts.
- [Crassus](https://handbook.syslifters.com/pentesting-manual/active-directory/privilege-escalation/crassus.md): Using Crassus to discover LPE candidates (writable paths, missing DLLs) from a Process Monitor boot log and weaponise them via DLL hijacking.
- [Create security roles and set permissions](https://handbook.syslifters.com/pentesting-manual/power-platform/create-security-roles-and-set-permissions.md): Microsoft Learn references for Dataverse security roles, privileges, and user security configuration.
- [Credential dumping](https://handbook.syslifters.com/pentesting-manual/active-directory/credential-access/credential-dumping.md): Notes and commands for credential dumping in AD environments (e.g., Mimikatz, SCCM).
- [Credential Guard](https://handbook.syslifters.com/pentesting-manual/active-directory/defense-evasion/credential-guard.md): Tools and checklists for bypassing Credential Guard.
- [CRLF injection to add email CC](https://handbook.syslifters.com/pentesting-manual/web-applications/auth/crlf-email-cc.md): Steal password reset links by injecting new headers (CC) via newline injection.
- [Datenschutzerklärung](https://handbook.syslifters.com/de/datenschutz.md): Datenschutzerklärung für handbook.syslifters.com
- [Default permissions and access](https://handbook.syslifters.com/pentesting-manual/power-platform/default-permissions-and-access.md): How default environment permissions and Dataverse security roles typically work, plus governance pitfalls and recommendations.
- [Delegations overview](https://handbook.syslifters.com/pentesting-manual/active-directory/lateral-movement/kerberos-delegation/delegations-overview.md): Overview page for Kerberos delegation topics.
- [DNS manipulation](https://handbook.syslifters.com/pentesting-manual/active-directory/lateral-movement/dns-manipulation.md): Notes and tooling references for DNS manipulation and related coercion setups.
- [Downloading m3u8 playlists](https://handbook.syslifters.com/pentesting-manual/web-applications/m3u8-playlist-download.md): Practical ways to download HLS streams using browser extensions, yt-dlp, or ffmpeg.
- [During our pentests](https://handbook.syslifters.com/during-pentests.md): How we work during a pentest, including communication, confidentiality, source IP, and retest policy.
- [Email setup](https://handbook.syslifters.com/organization/human-resources/email-setup.md): Configure email encryption (S/MIME) and legally required signatures/footers for eM Client, Nextcloud Mail, and Thunderbird.
- [Environment variables stored as plain text](https://handbook.syslifters.com/pentesting-manual/power-platform/environment-variables-stored-as-plain-text.md): Avoid storing secrets in text environment variables; use secret variables backed by Azure Key Vault.
- [Executive summaries](https://handbook.syslifters.com/pentesting-manual/reporting/executive-summaries.md): Coming soon.
- [Fileshare enumeration](https://handbook.syslifters.com/pentesting-manual/active-directory/enumeration/fileshare-enumeration.md): Techniques and tools for discovering and analyzing SMB file shares in AD environments.
- [Finding descriptions](https://handbook.syslifters.com/pentesting-manual/reporting/findings/descriptions.md): Coming soon.
- [Finding recommendations](https://handbook.syslifters.com/pentesting-manual/reporting/findings/recommendations.md): Coming soon.
- [Finding summaries](https://handbook.syslifters.com/pentesting-manual/reporting/findings/summaries.md): Coming soon.
- [Finding titles](https://handbook.syslifters.com/pentesting-manual/reporting/findings/titles.md): How to write concise, concrete pentest finding titles that communicate impact and root cause.
- [Flutter app setup (proxy & TLS)](https://handbook.syslifters.com/pentesting-manual/mobile/flutter-app-setup.md): Practical steps to work around Flutter apps ignoring proxy settings and system trust stores.
- [Framework-specific wordlists](https://handbook.syslifters.com/pentesting-manual/web-applications/wordlists/framework-specific.md): Starting points for framework and service endpoint discovery.
- [Hallo! Wir sind die Syslifters.](https://handbook.syslifters.com/de.md): Syslifters ist ein spezialisiertes Pentesting-Unternehmen aus Österreich mit Fokus auf Pentests von Active Directory, Entra ID, Infrastrukturen und Web-Applikationen.
- [Hash cracking](https://handbook.syslifters.com/pentesting-manual/active-directory/credential-access/hash-cracking.md): Hash cracking workflows and references for AD passwords and Kerberos material.
- [Hijack RDP session](https://handbook.syslifters.com/pentesting-manual/active-directory/credential-access/hijack-rdp-session.md): Techniques for taking over existing RDP sessions for lateral movement or privilege escalation.
- [Host and service discovery](https://handbook.syslifters.com/pentesting-manual/active-directory/enumeration/network-enumeration/host-and-service-discovery.md): Host, port, and service discovery for AD engagements using SmartScanner.
- [Host enumeration](https://handbook.syslifters.com/pentesting-manual/active-directory/enumeration/host-enumeration.md): Tools and checklists for enumerating Windows hosts during Active Directory assessments.
- [HTTP / RPC relaying](https://handbook.syslifters.com/pentesting-manual/active-directory/lateral-movement/http-rpc-relaying.md): ntlmrelayx workflows for relaying to AD CS via HTTP and RPC interfaces.
- [HTTPS traffic decryption with Wireshark](https://handbook.syslifters.com/pentesting-manual/fat-clients/https-traffic-decryption-with-wireshark.md): Decrypt TLS traffic by logging ephemeral session keys with SSLKEYLOGFILE and loading them into Wireshark.
- [Human Resources](https://handbook.syslifters.com/organization/human-resources.md): Coming soon.
- [Identity & policy enumeration](https://handbook.syslifters.com/pentesting-manual/entraid-azure/enumeration/identity-and-policy-enumeration.md): Enumerate Entra ID identities, role assignments, and Conditional Access policies with ROADtools / ROADrecon.
- [Infos für den Einkauf](https://handbook.syslifters.com/de/fuer-den-einkauf.md): Hinweise für den Einkauf - Spesen/Barauslagen, Abrechnung, Storno-Regeln und Verweis auf AGB.
- [Internal Tools of a Pentesting company](https://handbook.syslifters.com/pentesting-manual/internal-toolset.md): Internal tools and providers we use to run the company, with a note about migrating toward European/open-source solutions.
- [IPv6 MitM](https://handbook.syslifters.com/pentesting-manual/active-directory/lateral-movement/ipv6-mitm.md): Abusing Windows IPv6 defaults with mitm6 to become DNS for a target host and chain into NTLM relaying.
- [Java RMI](https://handbook.syslifters.com/pentesting-manual/fat-clients/java-rmi.md): Quick primer on Java RMI, what to look for during testing, and tools/approaches for exploration.
- [JWT attacks](https://handbook.syslifters.com/pentesting-manual/web-applications/jwt-attacks.md): Quick usage snippet for jwt_tool playbook scanning.
- [Katana recon pipeline](https://handbook.syslifters.com/pentesting-manual/web-applications/recon/katana-pipeline.md): Crawl + archive URL collection, JS discovery, and secret scanning workflow.
- [Kontaktiert uns](https://handbook.syslifters.com/de/contact-us.md): Kontaktmöglichkeiten für Syslifters (E-Mail mit S/MIME, Signal, Telefon, LinkedIn, GitHub).
- [LDAP relaying](https://handbook.syslifters.com/pentesting-manual/active-directory/lateral-movement/ldap-relaying.md): Techniques for relaying NTLM authentication to LDAP, including WebClient coercion workflows.
- [Learn and practice](https://handbook.syslifters.com/pentesting-manual/web-applications/learn-and-practice.md): Curated resources for web application hacking practice and staying up to date.
- [Leonard Rosian](https://handbook.syslifters.com/about-us/leonard.md): Profile page and CV for Leonard Rosian with contact details, experience, and training/certifications.
- [Leonard Rosian](https://handbook.syslifters.com/de/ueber-uns/leonard.md): Profilseite und Lebenslauf von Leonard Rosian mit Kontakt, Erfahrung und Ausbildung/Zertifikaten.
- [License to role mapping risks](https://handbook.syslifters.com/pentesting-manual/power-platform/license-to-role-mapping-risks.md): How license assignment and app sharing can implicitly grant Dataverse roles and lead to unintended data access.
- [Limit environment creation for users](https://handbook.syslifters.com/pentesting-manual/power-platform/limit-environment-creation-for-users.md): Reference for controlling who can create Power Platform environments in a tenant.
- [Limited audit trail due to missing logging configuration](https://handbook.syslifters.com/pentesting-manual/power-platform/limited-audit-trail-missing-logging-configuration.md): Enable Dataverse auditing and review retention settings to avoid gaps in audit trails.
- [LPE via NTLM and Kerberos relaying](https://handbook.syslifters.com/pentesting-manual/active-directory/privilege-escalation/kerberos-relaying.md): Local privilege escalation on domain-joined Windows hosts by relaying machine-account authentication to LDAP and abusing RBCD or shadow credentials.
- [Making changes](https://handbook.syslifters.com/making-changes.md): Guidelines for contributing changes to the handbook, including sensitivity and review expectations.
- [Mass assignment in password resets](https://handbook.syslifters.com/pentesting-manual/web-applications/auth/mass-assignment-password-resets.md): Try adding extra parameters to change another user's password.
- [Matthäus Förster](https://handbook.syslifters.com/about-us/matthaeus.md): Profile page and CV for Matthäus Förster with contact details, experience, and certifications.
- [Matthäus Förster](https://handbook.syslifters.com/de/ueber-uns/matthaeus.md): Profilseite und Lebenslauf von Matthäus Förster mit Kontakt, Erfahrung und Zertifikaten.
- [Michael Wedl](https://handbook.syslifters.com/about-us/michael.md): Profile page and CV for Michael Wedl with contact details, experience, and certifications.
- [Michael Wedl](https://handbook.syslifters.com/de/ueber-uns/michael.md): Profilseite und Lebenslauf von Michael Wedl mit Kontakt, Erfahrung und Zertifikaten.
- [Microsoft 365 pillaging](https://handbook.syslifters.com/pentesting-manual/entraid-azure/enumeration/microsoft-365-pillaging.md): Post-exploitation enumeration and pillaging of Microsoft 365 (mail, SharePoint, OneDrive, Teams) via Microsoft Graph with GraphRunner.
- [Missing data policy (Data Loss Prevention)](https://handbook.syslifters.com/pentesting-manual/power-platform/missing-data-loss-prevention-policy.md): Missing DLP policies can enable unwanted connectors and data exfiltration from Power Platform environments.
- [Nach unseren Pentests](https://handbook.syslifters.com/de/nach-pentests.md): Nach dem Pentest - Bericht, kostenlose Nachtests (unter Bedingungen) und Hinweise zum Deprovisionieren von Zugängen.
- [Network access control (NAC)](https://handbook.syslifters.com/pentesting-manual/active-directory/enumeration/network-enumeration/nac.md): VLAN discovery, 802.1X / NAC assessment, and voice-VLAN pivoting on access ports.
- [Normalization and Unicode attacks (password resets)](https://handbook.syslifters.com/pentesting-manual/web-applications/auth/normalization-unicode-attacks.md): Use Unicode/punycode edge cases to redirect reset links or bypass validation.
- [Not found](https://handbook.syslifters.com/404.md): Page not found.
- [NTLM channel binding for web apps](https://handbook.syslifters.com/pentesting-manual/web-applications/ntlm-channel-binding.md): Notes on testing "Extended Protection for Authentication" (EPA) / channel binding for NTLM over HTTPS.
- [OIDC (quick note)](https://handbook.syslifters.com/pentesting-manual/web-applications/oidc.md): Flow choices and PKCE reminder.
- [Open redirect via HTML file upload](https://handbook.syslifters.com/pentesting-manual/web-applications/file-upload/open-redirect.md): Upload an HTML file that instantly redirects users via meta refresh; prevent by blocking HTML or forcing safe download headers.
- [Overview of Microsoft Power Platform](https://handbook.syslifters.com/pentesting-manual/power-platform/overview-of-microsoft-power-platform.md): A quick overview of the Power Platform components and how they relate (Power BI, Power Apps, Power Automate, Power Virtual Agents, Dataverse, connectors).
- [Overview of our pentesting procedure](https://handbook.syslifters.com/pentesting-procedure.md): Our pentesting approach from kickoff and execution to reporting, remediation, and a free retest within eight weeks.
- [Parameter pollution (password resets)](https://handbook.syslifters.com/pentesting-manual/web-applications/auth/parameter-pollution.md): Account takeover patterns when duplicate parameters are interpreted in surprising ways.
- [Password managers](https://handbook.syslifters.com/pentesting-manual/active-directory/credential-access/password-managers.md): Post-compromise credential extraction from enterprise password-manager / vault solutions encountered on internal engagements.
- [Password spraying](https://handbook.syslifters.com/pentesting-manual/active-directory/credential-access/password-spraying.md): Password spraying starting points for AD environments.
- [Patrick Pirker](https://handbook.syslifters.com/about-us/patrick.md): Profile page and CV for Patrick Pirker with contact details, experience, and certifications.
- [Patrick Pirker](https://handbook.syslifters.com/de/ueber-uns/patrick.md): Profilseite und Lebenslauf von Patrick Pirker mit Kontakt, Erfahrung und Zertifikaten.
- [Penetration Testing-Praktikum](https://handbook.syslifters.com/de/pentesting-praktikum.md): Praktikumsstelle im Penetration Testing (remote) mit Aufgaben, Anforderungen, Rahmenbedingungen und Bewerbung.
- [Pentest operation rules](https://handbook.syslifters.com/pentesting-manual/operation-rules.md): A practical checklist for prep, collaboration, evidence hygiene, and secure handling of customer data during pentests.
- [Pentest planning process](https://handbook.syslifters.com/pentesting-manual/pentest-planning-process.md): This document describes the Syslifters pentest planning process and the kanban-style Pentest Planning Board we use to run it.
- [Pentesting Demo-Berichte](https://handbook.syslifters.com/de/pentesting-demo-reports.md): Demo-Pentestberichte (AD, Web, Extern) zum Einblick in Aufbau und Qualität unserer Reports.
- [Pentesting in Aachen: a list of pentesting providers](https://handbook.syslifters.com/p/pentesting-in-aachen.md): We at Syslifters focus on high-quality pentests and partnership-based cooperation. Sometimes we are not the right partner. Here is our compiled list of pentesting providers in Aachen.

Manchmal sind wir nicht der richtige Partner. Hier findet ihr unsere Liste an Pentesting-Anbietern in St. Marienkirchen.

- [Pentesting Manual](https://handbook.syslifters.com/pentesting-manual.md): Overview and entry point to our pentesting notes, playbooks, and reporting guidance.
- [Pentesting Sample Reports](https://handbook.syslifters.com/pentesting-sample-reports.md): Downloadable pentest sample reports (AD, web, external) showcasing our reporting style.
- [Physical security](https://handbook.syslifters.com/pentesting-manual/physical-security.md): A collection of ideas for assessing physical security around offices, devices, documents, and access control.
- [Power Platform dataverse](https://handbook.syslifters.com/pentesting-manual/power-platform/power-platform-dataverse.md): What Dataverse is, when to use it, and a practical overview of the Dataverse security model and common pitfalls.
- [Power Platform environments](https://handbook.syslifters.com/pentesting-manual/power-platform/power-platform-environments.md): What environments are, how they relate to Dataverse, and common environment types and governance notes.
- [Pricing](https://handbook.syslifters.com/de/pricing.md): Preisgestaltung für Pentests inkl. Tagsatz, Richtwerte, Rabatte und Partnerhinweise.
- [Pricing](https://handbook.syslifters.com/pricing.md): Pricing model for pentests, including day rates, typical project ranges, and discount rules.
- [Privacy Policy](https://handbook.syslifters.com/privacy.md): Privacy policy for handbook.syslifters.com.
- [PrivescCheck](https://handbook.syslifters.com/pentesting-manual/active-directory/privilege-escalation/privesc-check.md): Running PrivescCheck to enumerate local privilege escalation opportunities on a Windows host.
- [Pro Bono Pentests](https://handbook.syslifters.com/de/pro-bono-pentests.md): Pro-Bono-Pentestprogramm - Voraussetzungen, Erwartungen, verpflichtende Retests und Kontakt.
- [Pro Bono Pentests](https://handbook.syslifters.com/pro-bono-pentests.md): Pro bono pentest program - eligibility, expectations, retesting requirements, and how to apply.
- [Projektförderung für Web-Pentests](https://handbook.syslifters.com/de/kmu-cybersecurity-web-pentest.md): CC BY Vorlage für einen Projektantrag zur AWS-Förderung KMU.Cybersecurity für einen Web-Pentest.
- [PXE boot](https://handbook.syslifters.com/pentesting-manual/active-directory/credential-access/pxe-boot.md): PXE boot attack chain notes for extracting SCCM secrets and certificates.
- [Read access to tables with compiled assemblies](https://handbook.syslifters.com/pentesting-manual/power-platform/read-access-to-tables-with-compiled-assemblies.md): How overly broad table permissions can allow users to list and download compiled Dataverse/D365 plugin assemblies.
- [Remote debugging on mobile](https://handbook.syslifters.com/pentesting-manual/mobile/remote-debugging.md): Use Chrome remote debugging when TLS interception breaks on-device traffic inspection.
- [Report writing](https://handbook.syslifters.com/pentesting-manual/reporting/report-writing.md): Style and clarity guidelines for pentest reports (voice, tense, recommendations, and redaction).
- [Resource-Based Constrained Delegation (RBCD)](https://handbook.syslifters.com/pentesting-manual/active-directory/lateral-movement/kerberos-delegation/rbcd.md): Abusing msDS-AllowedToActOnBehalfOfOtherIdentity to impersonate any user against a target computer.
- [Samuel Haim](https://handbook.syslifters.com/about-us/samuel.md): Profile page and CV for Samuel Haim with contact details, experience, and certifications.
- [Samuel Haim](https://handbook.syslifters.com/de/ueber-uns/samuel.md): Profilseite und Lebenslauf von Samuel Haim mit Kontakt, Erfahrung und Zertifikaten.
- [Screenshots](https://handbook.syslifters.com/pentesting-manual/reporting/screenshots.md): How to take clear, useful, and properly redacted screenshots for pentest reports.
- [Search Shodan for SSH keys](https://handbook.syslifters.com/pentesting-manual/external/search-shodan-for-ssh-keys.md): Get an SSH host key fingerprint and use it to find reused keys across hosts via Shodan.
- [Sending reports](https://handbook.syslifters.com/pentesting-manual/reporting/sending-reports.md): Coming soon.
- [Sensitive data discovery](https://handbook.syslifters.com/pentesting-manual/entraid-azure/enumeration/sensitive-data-discovery.md): Hunt credential stores, secrets, and high-risk file types across SharePoint, OneDrive, and Exchange Online using Microsoft Purview eDiscovery content search.
- [Service description of penetration tests](https://handbook.syslifters.com/service-description.md): Service description (terms) for offensive security services.
- [Servicebeschreibung Penetration-Tests](https://handbook.syslifters.com/de/servicebeschreibung.md): Servicebeschreibung für Penetration-Tests und Phishing-Simulationen inkl. Umfang, Mitwirkungspflichten, Geheimhaltung, Haftung und Reporting.
- [Shadow credentials](https://handbook.syslifters.com/pentesting-manual/active-directory/lateral-movement/shadow-credentials.md): Abusing msDS-KeyCredentialLink (key trust) to request TGTs for target objects.
- [Small brute force password lists](https://handbook.syslifters.com/pentesting-manual/web-applications/wordlists/small-bruteforce-lists.md): Compact default credential lists for quick checks across common services.
- [SMB relaying](https://handbook.syslifters.com/pentesting-manual/active-directory/lateral-movement/smb-relaying.md): Methodology and tooling for NTLM relaying attacks over SMB in AD environments.
- [Social security numbers generator](https://handbook.syslifters.com/pentesting-manual/socialsecuritynumbersgenerator.md): Client-side generator for valid-format Austrian social security numbers.
- [Solutions in Power Platform](https://handbook.syslifters.com/pentesting-manual/power-platform/solutions-in-power-platform.md): How solutions bundle apps, flows, tables, and security components for deployment and governance across environments.
- [SQLi and XSS payloads in filenames](https://handbook.syslifters.com/pentesting-manual/web-applications/file-upload/sqli-xss-in-filename.md): Basic payload examples when filenames are concatenated into SQL/HTML contexts.
- [Stellenausschreibung: Senior Penetrationtester](https://handbook.syslifters.com/de/pentesting-senior.md): Stellenausschreibung für einen Senior-Penetrationtester (remote, unbefristet) inkl. Aufgaben, Anforderungen und Bewerbung.
- [This could be important for procurement](https://handbook.syslifters.com/for-procurement.md): Procurement notes - billable expenses, time-based billing, cancellation terms, and where to find formal terms.
- [Tool cheat sheet](https://handbook.syslifters.com/pentesting-manual/active-directory/tool-cheat-sheet.md): Quick-reference commands for common Active Directory tooling.
- [Toolset for Security Penetration Tests](https://handbook.syslifters.com/pentesting-manual/pentesting-toolset.md): Recommended tools and plugins we use for pentesting across web, AD/Windows, and reporting workflows.
- [Travel expenses](https://handbook.syslifters.com/organization/human-resources/travel-expenses.md): General guide for business travel - choosing a hotel, picking the right transportation (ÖBB or car), tracking costs and getting compensation.
- [Überblick zu unserem Vorgehen bei Pentests](https://handbook.syslifters.com/de/pentesting-vorgehen.md): Unser Vorgehen beim Pentest – von Vorbesprechung und Durchführung bis Bericht, Behebung und kostenlosem Re-Test innerhalb von 8 Wochen.
- [Unconstrained Kerberos delegation](https://handbook.syslifters.com/pentesting-manual/active-directory/lateral-movement/kerberos-delegation/unconstrained-delegation.md): Abusing TRUSTED_FOR_DELEGATION to capture forwardable TGTs and impersonate users who authenticate to a compromised host.
- [Universal WAF bypass (request padding)](https://handbook.syslifters.com/pentesting-manual/web-applications/universal-waf-bypass.md): Many WAFs inspect only the first N KB of a request body; prepend junk to push payload past inspection limits.
- [Unser Vesting-Vertrag](https://handbook.syslifters.com/de/vesting-vertrag.md): Erklärung und Auszug der Vesting-Vereinbarung der Syslifters-Gründer (Vesting-Zeitraum, Einziehung/Clawback bei vorzeitigem Ausstieg).
- [Unsere Skill-Matrix](https://handbook.syslifters.com/de/skill-matrix.md): Skill-Matrix mit Selbsteinschätzung unserer Stärken in Pentesting- und Security-Bereichen.
- [User agent wordlists](https://handbook.syslifters.com/pentesting-manual/web-applications/wordlists/user-agents.md): Links and exported UA lists for fuzzing / WAF behavior checks.
- [UUID v1 sandwich attack](https://handbook.syslifters.com/pentesting-manual/web-applications/auth/uuidv1-sandwich-attack.md): If password reset links use UUIDv1, try a sandwich attack to guess adjacent UUIDs.
- [Vor unseren Pentests](https://handbook.syslifters.com/de/vor-pentests.md): Ablauf vor dem Pentest - Scoping, Timebox, Permission to Attack, Vorlaufzeit und organisatorische Vorbereitung.
- [Vulnerability Disclosure](https://handbook.syslifters.com/de/vulnerability-disclosure.md): Wie du Schwachstellen meldest und unsere Vulnerability-Disclosure-Policy (Scope, Safe Harbour, Regeln).
- [Vulnerability Disclosure](https://handbook.syslifters.com/vulnerability-disclosure.md): How to report vulnerabilities to Syslifters and our vulnerability disclosure policy (including scope and safe harbour).
- [Während unserer Pentests](https://handbook.syslifters.com/de/waehrend-pentests.md): Zusammenarbeit während des Pentests inkl. Austausch, Vertraulichkeit, Quell-IP und Nachtest-Regelung.
- [Was kostet die Gründung einer Pentesting-Firma?](https://handbook.syslifters.com/de/gruendungskosten.md): Aufschlüsselung der Gründungskosten einer Pentesting-Firma in Österreich (2022) inkl. laufender Kosten und Lizenzen.
- [Was wir anbieten](https://handbook.syslifters.com/de/was-wir-anbieten.md): Überblick über unsere offensiven Security-Services, Schwerpunkte und Leistungen, die wir bewusst nicht anbieten.
- [WDAC & AppLocker](https://handbook.syslifters.com/pentesting-manual/active-directory/defense-evasion/wdac-applocker.md): Bypassing WDAC and concept and implementation notes for restricting PowerShell capabilities via WDAC and AppLocker.
- [WebSocket hijacking (origin/SOP note)](https://handbook.syslifters.com/pentesting-manual/web-applications/websocket-hijacking.md): WebSockets bypass some expectations of SOP; validate Origin and authenticate the channel.
- [What we provide](https://handbook.syslifters.com/what-we-provide.md): Overview of Syslifters’ offensive security services, focus areas, and what services we intentionally do not offer.
- [Working together in projects](https://handbook.syslifters.com/pentesting-manual/working-together.md): How we collaborate during pentests depending on the timebox.
- [WSUS](https://handbook.syslifters.com/pentesting-manual/active-directory/lateral-movement/wsus.md): Abusing legitimate WSUS admin access to push SYSTEM-level code to downstream clients via SharpWSUS.
- [WSUS](https://handbook.syslifters.com/pentesting-manual/active-directory/privilege-escalation/wsus.md): Local privilege escalation by MitM-ing an HTTP WSUS feed and injecting a fake Microsoft-signed update that runs as SYSTEM.
- [XMP metadata injection in PNG uploads](https://handbook.syslifters.com/pentesting-manual/web-applications/file-upload/xmp-metadata-injection-png.md): Embed XML/HTML payloads in PNG XMP metadata to exploit downstream processing or unsafe rendering.
- [XSS via SVG file upload](https://handbook.syslifters.com/pentesting-manual/web-applications/file-upload/svg-xss.md): SVG can embed scripts that execute when rendered; validate content and serve safely.
- [XXE payloads](https://handbook.syslifters.com/pentesting-manual/web-applications/xxe-payloads.md): Payloads and techniques for in-band and blind XXE testing and exfiltration.
- [YubiKey setup](https://handbook.syslifters.com/organization/human-resources/yubikey-setup.md): Setup guide for using a YubiKey for PIV/SSH (Windows) and basic GPG/SSH agent configuration.
